name: Accounting Method Change Adjustment Spread

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be changing their method of accounting and have a resulting increase in taxable income exceeding $3,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to spread the tax impact of an accounting method change over multiple years (or use 3-year lookback limits) to prevent a massive tax spike in a single year.
